recommended_style.duration: Keep videos around 58 seconds to match the channel average.
recommended_style.posting: Post on Sunday afternoon (UTC) when engagement tends to be strongest.
recommended_style.title: Prefer short titles based on top-performing patterns.
recommended_style.hashtags: Use about 2.0 hashtags per title, including #雑学, #まとめる犬.
recommended_style.keywords: Lean on recurring themes such as ゴルフボール, 見つ, スパゲッティ, 収穫, 大統領.
recommended_style.summary: This channel performs best with short titles, 58-second videos, and posting on Sunday afternoon (UTC).
